# Varun Daiya - Developer & Research Portfolio

> CS + Physics undergraduate student building at the intersection of machine learning, quantum algorithms, and cognitive architectures.

## Core Project
- Terminus: A 2.6B-parameter native ternary (1.58-bit) SLM for offline, low-memory execution on Android devices supporting Indic languages.

## Key Links & Resources
- GitHub Profile: https://github.com/varun29-git
- Substack Essays: https://varundaiya.substack.com
- ArXiv Quantum Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27015
- Quantum Amplitude Amplification Survey: https://zenodo.org/records/20054981
- Full Machine-Readable Knowledge Base: /llms-full.txt
- Machine View Interactive Mode: /?mode=machine

## Projects
- NNCS-Mamba: Neural controller for drones using formal mathematical verification (https://github.com/varun29-git/NNCS-Mamba)
- ampamp: Python library for quantum amplitude amplification (https://github.com/QuantumAmplification/ampamp)
- VectorCLM: 145M parameter AI language model trained from scratch (https://github.com/varun29-git/VectorCLM)
- MambaReview: Benchmark & study of Mamba state space models (https://github.com/varun29-git/MambaReview)
- WorldModels: Neural environment prediction system (https://github.com/varun29-git/WorldModels)

## Essays
- After the Wall (1-bit AI Scaling): https://varundaiya.substack.com/p/after-the-wall
- Ink, Bits, and Tokens (Information Paradigms): https://varundaiya.substack.com/p/ink-bits-and-tokens
